title: BEM-923 context done
objective:
Append to governance/AGENT_CONTEXT.md: 

## BEM-923 completed | 2026-05-30
Prepared new full-system protocol v3 with provider execution model after operator identified missing architecture layer in BEM-921.
Context proof: governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM923_AGENT_CONTEXT_READ.md
Provider scan: governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM922_PROVIDER_ARCH_SCAN_READY.md
Worker request: governance/audit/mailbox/to_curator/BEM923_SYSTEM_PROTOCOL_V3_PROVIDER_MODEL_REQUEST.md
Worker review: governance/audit/internal/results/BEM923_WORKER_SYSTEM_PROTOCOL_V3_PROVIDER_MODEL_REVIEW.md
Curator response: governance/audit/mailbox/from_curator/BEM923_SYSTEM_PROTOCOL_V3_PROVIDER_MODEL_RESPONSE.md
Repo protocol record: governance/reports/BEM923_SYSTEM_PROTOCOL_V3_PROVIDER_MODEL.md
Result: SYSTEM_PROTOCOL_V3_PROVIDER_MODEL_APPROVED_WITH_REQUIREMENTS. Protocol is full-system, not Telegram-only. BEM-921 logical contour model is preserved but expanded with provider execution layer. Primary internal contour: GPT Analyst, Claude Auditor, Claude Executor. Reserve contour: GPT-Codex/Codex replaces Claude Auditor and Claude Executor when Claude limits or availability block execution. Prompt describes logical role; provider policy selects runtime provider. GitHub Actions, codex-runner, webhook and dispatch consumer are activation/proof mechanisms, not roles. Required registries: providers_registry.json, contour_provider_policy.json, provider_failover_policy.json, elements_registry.json and contours_registry.json. Envelopes must carry logical_role, provider_id, provider_mode, fallback_used, fallback_reason, runner_ref, event_ref and proof_ref.
Local operator artifacts: BEM923_system_protocol_v3_provider_model_ru.docx and BEM923_system_protocol_v3_provider_model_ru.zip.
QA: DOCX rendered to 5 pages; no edge clipping detected.
Next: operator review and approval of BEM-923, then implementation starts with elements/contours/providers SSOT and provider-aware lifecycle.
No issue comments.
